schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: How We Work | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Step-by-step engagement process: initial consultation, scoping, engagement letter, data collection, execution, report delivery, post-delivery support. Transparent timelines.

schemas.name: How We Work
schemas.description: Step-by-step process for how we work in India.

step.name: Free Initial Consultation
step.text: Schedule a 30-minute call or office visit. We understand your requirements and identify applicable regulatory frameworks.

step.name: Scoping & Quotation
step.text: Detailed scope, timeline, and fixed-fee quotation provided within 24 hours.

step.name: Engagement Letter & Advance
step.text: Formal engagement letter specifying scope, fees, timelines, and confidentiality obligations.

step.name: Data Collection
step.text: Structured data checklist provided. Our team coordinates collection and clarifications. 3-5 days typical.

step.name: Execution & Analysis
step.text: Substantive work using our AI-powered tools, 18-method valuation engine, and statistical validation suite.

step.name: Quality Assurance
step.text: V-QVA quality gate: cross-method validation, sensitivity analysis, regulatory compliance check.

step.name: Delivery & Walkthrough
step.text: Final report delivered with detailed explanation of methodology, assumptions, and conclusions.

step.name: Post-Delivery Support
step.text: Ongoing support for regulatory queries, annual updates, and compliance management.

mainEntity.name: How long does a typical valuation take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard: 5-7 working days from data receipt. Express: 2-3 days with additional charge. Timeline depends on data availability and complexity. IBC valuations (CIRP) have statutory timelines and are prioritised accordingly.

mainEntity.name: What data do I need to provide?

acceptedAnswer.text: Varies by engagement. For valuations: 3-5 years of financial statements, business plan, shareholding pattern, articles of association, and any previous valuation reports. For registration: PAN, Aadhaar, address proof, business address proof. We provide a detailed checklist at engagement.

mainEntity.name: Do you work with companies outside Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All services are delivered pan-India. Valuations and advisory work are digital-first. For registrations and filings, we handle the complete process online regardless of your location. Physical meetings are available at our three offices.

Free consultation → Engagement letter with fixed fee → Data collection → Execution → Draft delivery → Client review → Final report → Post-delivery support. Typical turnaround: 7-20 days depending on service.

mainEntity.name: How do you communicate during an engagement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dedicated point of contact assigned. WhatsApp/email for routine queries. Video calls for complex discussions. Weekly status updates for multi-week engagements. All communication documented.
Proprietary Valuation Engine Pro (18 methods, Monte Carlo), AI-assisted GST/IT analyser, compliance calendar platform, secure document exchange portal, and cloud-based collaboration tools.
Yes. We execute NDAs for all engagements involving confidential business or financial information. Standard NDA provided at engagement. Client-specific NDA terms accepted.

30-day post-delivery support for queries, clarifications, and minor modifications. For valuations: support during regulatory review or investor queries. For appeals: support through hearing and order.
